utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now we check the final package:
1. destination – present and fully specified (Lisbon, Portugal).
2. travel_dates – present and specific (2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05).
3. transportation – includes flight details with costs: airline, class, baggage, departure/arrival airports, total cost (€400). Fully specified.
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, type, star rating, location, room type, inclusions, total cost (€600). Fully specified.
5. activities – includes main activity, type, duration, guide, cancellation, total cost (€120). Fully specified.
6. additional_services – includes dining options, dietary accommodations, total dining cost (€400). Fully specified.
7. total_budget – included (€1,720). Fully specified.
All 7 items are present and complete.
